productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Check Red Dress
description: Style NoteMake your own casual fashion rules with this red and white checked dress from united colors of benetton. The style is fresh and summery while the cotton fabric will keep you feeling comfortable all day. Team this with heeled sandals and keep your jewellery nice and simple for an easy, relaxed look.Product DetailsRed and white checked sleeveless dress, has a cross over V-neck with white lace, broad shoulder straps, empire waist, pleated from the waist down, elasticated smocking at the back and a sashMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash in 30 degrees with like colours using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
